title: umb4.1-research: KISS protocol research for LCI CoAP/IPv6/control
description: Research KISS framing adaptations for carrying IPv6 packets, CoAP messages, and LICHEN control commands over BLE UART/serial. Study spec/kiss-framing.md, standards/ham-radio.md, docs/kiss-aprs-bridge.md, spec/11-lci.md (SLIP vs KISS), existing lichen/lib/native/native.c framing, Python KISS in python/src/lichen/interface/kiss/. Identify how to avoid breaking standard KISS tools (no silent extensions to CMD byte). Document recommended port numbers, command usage for local traffic, escape rules, MTU. Output recommendations for schema and mapping.
notes: Parallel subagent research delegated. Follow workflow-rule-every-small-code-generation-or-fix with 3 codereviews per chunk.
